mapper.select: SELECT a.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, s.class_name, r.room_number, b.name as building_name, u2.real_name as checker_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN assignment asgn ON s.id = asgn.student_id AND asgn.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN room r ON asgn.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON a.checker_id = u2.id ORDER BY a.check_date DESC, a.check_time DESC

SELECT a.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, s.class_name, r.room_number, b.name as building_name, u2.real_name as checker_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN assignment asgn ON s.id = asgn.student_id AND asgn.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN room r ON asgn.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON a.checker_id = u2.id ORDER BY a.check_date DESC, a.check_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT a.*, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, s.class_name, r.room_number, b.name as building_name, u2.real_name as checker_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN assignment asgn ON s.id = asgn.student_id AND asgn.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN room r ON asgn.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON a.checker_id = u2.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT s.id as student_id, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, s.class_name, r.room_number, b.name as building_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN assignment asgn ON s.id = asgn.student_id AND asgn.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN room r ON asgn.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id WHERE b.id = #{buildingId} ORDER BY r.room_number, s.student_number

SELECT s.id as student_id, s.student_number, u.real_name as student_name, s.class_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.counselor_id = #{counselorId} ORDER BY s.class_name, s.student_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (student_id, check_date, check_time, status, remarks, checker_id) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{checkDate}, #{checkTime}, #{status}, #{remarks}, #{checkerId})

INSERT INTO attendance (student_id, check_date, check_time, status, remarks, checker_id) VALUES
(#{item.studentId}, #{item.checkDate}, #{item.checkTime}, #{item.status}, #{item.remarks}, #{item.checkerId})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), remarks = VALUES(remarks), checker_id = VALUES(checker_id)
